content: Prefer stdlib over hand-rolled implementations. Use slices.SortFunc, slices.Equal, etc.
Remove dead code rather than guarding it. No commented-out code, no unused functions behind build tags.
Never mock what you can use for real. Test against real Postgres via Docker for pgcontract.
No type aliases. Shared types live in contract/ package. No circular dependencies between packages.
External deps: pgx/v5 (PostgreSQL driver), golang.org/x/text (encoding detection), excelize/v2 (Excel parsing). Resist adding more.

title: Module path github.com/JacobJNilsson/data-contract-generator
rationale: Published as a proper Go module with tags. Previously was github.com/jacobjnilsson/contract-gen with a local replace directive. Fixed by publishing with the correct casing and removing the replace.
